summary: Iteration 40: UI bug fixes for Events module verified. All 6 features tested and working correctly: (1) Checkbox field no longer duplicates label - renders once with label next to checkbox, (2) Select field renders as dropdown with proper options, (3) BookingHeader with institution branding visible on all public pages, (4) Admin form builder up/down arrows work for reordering fields, (5) Select field options use textarea (line-by-line) instead of comma-separated, (6) Public form submission flow works end-to-end with QR payment.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>' - React hydration warning in select elements, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Checkbox field renders correctly - label appears only once next to checkbox (no duplication)
VERIFIED: Select field renders as native dropdown with proper options
VERIFIED: BookingHeader component visible on all public event pages (list, detail, form, success)
VERIFIED: Admin form builder has ChevronUp/ChevronDown arrows for field reordering - tested and working
VERIFIED: Select field options in admin use textarea with line-by-line input (label: 'Možnosti výběru (každá na novém řádku)')
VERIFIED: Number type field uses type='tel' to avoid browser spinner
VERIFIED: End-to-end form submission flow works - form filled, submitted, QR code displayed with payment details
seed_data_creation: Test application created during e2e testing for 'Za uměním do Lázní' event
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI bug fixes verified. Events module working correctly. Two events exist: 'Za uměním do Lázní' (with checkboxes, selects, text fields) and 'Příměstský tábor Léto 2026' (simple form with 3 text fields). BookingHeader shows institution logo and 'Powered by Budeživo.cz'. Form field reordering in admin works with up/down arrows. Select options use textarea for line-by-line input.

verified_features.feature: Public form submission flow with QR payment
verified_features.test_case: Playwright test - full flow completed: event list → detail → date selection → form fill → submit → QR success page
